violations.text: Sausage links, which were prepared in advance, were not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Sausage links were observed at 50 DF in the prep unit and voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Per PIC, sausage links were placed warm in the prep unit yesterday. Proper cooling methods reviewed with PIC. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026
The sanitizer dispenser at the 3-bay sink was observed not working and in poor repair. Per PIC, service has been called. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026
Strainer was observed in the hand-washing sink at the bar. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

Sour cream was observed held on top of prep unit at 52 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC informed on proper cold holding processes. PIC relocated to prep unit at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
Single service items were observed stored on the floor in the dry storage area. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025
The wall in the rinse sink area has an accumulation of black residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2023

Inspector observed diced potatoes being stored in plastic containers greater than 4 inches deep. PIC informed to portion food during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2023
Knives, located in the kitchen, were observed being stored in between equipment. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2023
Inspector observed a pizza peel being stored on the floor. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the hood/ventilation unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023
